title: Mbuyiselo’s happy time picks
description: BUSINESS NEWS - If you're one of...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - If you're one of Mbuyiselo Vilakazi’s loyal followers on Instagram or TikTok, you already know the man has a sixth sense for top-tier entertainment.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - If you're one of Mbuyiselo Vilakazi’s loyal followers on Instagram or TikTok, you already know the man has a sixth sense for top-tier entertainment."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Whether he's dissecting red carpet looks or putting you on to your next binge-worthy show, Mbuyiselo never misses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now, he's teamed up with BBC Brit to share his Happy Time Picks - a curated list of the must-watch dramas that have him completely hooked this winter. As part of the channel’s Find Your Happy, Every Night campaign, Mbuyiselo is inviting viewers to dive into stories that offer comfort, intrigue, and a little escapism after a long day.","html":"Now, he's teamed up with BBC Brit to share his Happy Time Picks - a curated list of the must-watch dramas that have him completely hooked this winter. As part of the channel’s Find Your Happy, Every Night campaign, Mbuyiselo is inviting viewers to dive into stories that offer comfort, intrigue, and a little escapism after a long day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here’s what he’s loving right now on BBC Brit (DStv Channel 120):","html":"Here’s what he’s loving right now on BBC Brit (DStv Channel 120):"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1. Beyond Paradise – Mondays at 20:00","html":"1. Beyond Paradise – Mondays at 20:00"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I call this one ‘cosy crime drama energy.’”","html":"“I call this one ‘cosy crime drama energy.’”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you were a fan of Death in Paradise, you’ll be obsessed with Beyond Paradise. It follows DI Humphrey Goodman and his partner Martha as they trade tropical life for the charming chaos of rural England. According to Mbuyiselo:","html":"If you were a fan of Death in Paradise, you’ll be obsessed with Beyond Paradise. It follows DI Humphrey Goodman and his partner Martha as they trade tropical life for the charming chaos of rural England. According to Mbuyiselo:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It’s wholesome, it’s quirky, and the cases are fun to follow without feeling too heavy. I watch it with tea and a blanket - it’s giving feel-good detective show.”","html":"“It’s wholesome, it’s quirky, and the cases are fun to follow without feeling too heavy. I watch it with tea and a blanket - it’s giving feel-good detective show.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2. Death in Paradise S14 – Mondays at 21:00","html":"2. Death in Paradise S14 – Mondays at 21:00"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“New detective, same addictive island vibes.”","html":"“New detective, same addictive island vibes.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Season 14 introduces DI Mervin Wilson, who swaps London for the Caribbean island of Saint Marie. As he tackles new murders, he’s also confronting his mother’s mysterious death.","html":"Season 14 introduces DI Mervin Wilson, who swaps London for the Caribbean island of Saint Marie. As he tackles new murders, he’s also confronting his mother’s mysterious death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This season feels fresh but still has that tropical suspense we love. And yes, I still try to solve the crime before the reveal - I never win.”","html":"“This season feels fresh but still has that tropical suspense we love. And yes, I still try to solve the crime before the reveal - I never win.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"3. Death Valley – Tuesdays at 20:00","html":"3. Death Valley – Tuesdays at 20:00 "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This is the one. Dark comedy meets small-town murder mystery.”","html":"“This is the one. Dark comedy meets small-town murder mystery.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Set in scenic Wales, Death Valley stars Timothy Spall in a series that’s both hilarious and suspenseful. Think Knives Out but with more sass and way better accents.","html":"Set in scenic Wales, Death Valley stars Timothy Spall in a series that’s both hilarious and suspenseful. Think Knives Out but with more sass and way better accents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This show is chaotic good! The leads are a mess (in the best way), and every week the mystery gets juicier. Also, I need to visit Wales now.”","html":"“This show is chaotic good! The leads are a mess (in the best way), and every week the mystery gets juicier. Also, I need to visit Wales now.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"4. Brokenwood Mysteries – Thursdays at 20:00","html":"4. Brokenwood Mysteries – Thursdays at 20:00"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"https://www.instagram.com/p/DLP0vxHt0Xk/","html":"https://www.instagram.com/p/DLP0vxHt0Xk/ "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“What I love about BBC Brit is that it really delivers on variety. You’re not boxed into one vibe—you can go from island drama to Welsh madness to quaint village crime all in one week. That’s how you find your happy, every night!”","html":"“What I love about BBC Brit is that it really delivers on variety. You’re not boxed into one vibe—you can go from island drama to Welsh madness to quaint village crime all in one week. That’s how you find your happy, every night!”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Catch all of Mbuyiselo’s Happy Time Picks on BBC Brit, Channel 120 on DStv.Let us know which one's your fave using #FindYourHappyZA and tag @BBCBritSA for a chance to be featured on our socials.","html":"Catch all of Mbuyiselo’s Happy Time Picks on BBC Brit, Channel 120 on DStv.
Let us know which one's your fave using #FindYourHappyZA and tag @BBCBritSA for a chance to be featured on our socials."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Murder, but make it New Zealand.”","html":"“Murder, but make it New Zealand.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd takes on strange and sometimes hilarious murder cases in the picturesque town of Brokenwood.","html":"Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd takes on strange and sometimes hilarious murder cases in the picturesque town of Brokenwood."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This one feels like a comfort show for crime lovers. It’s the kind of thing you can watch with your mom or binge solo on a Sunday. Very underrated!”","html":"“This one feels like a comfort show for crime lovers. It’s the kind of thing you can watch with your mom or binge solo on a Sunday. Very underrated!”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbuyiselo’s Verdict!","html":"Mbuyiselo’s Verdict!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
